schedule.description: Series preview — Cubs at Oracle Park, Game 1 of 3
Ben Brown Saturday start — 1.74 ERA, 58 K
Iowa Cubs 10-2 win + Kelly at Iowa

stories.title: Series Preview — Cubs Open 3 Games at Oracle Park
stories.angle: Cubs (35-34) open a 3-game road series at Oracle Park tonight vs the Giants (28-41), 9:15 PM CT. Assad starts Game 1. SF is one of MLB's weakest teams. Wild card urgency.

x_posts.label: Post 1A
x_posts.text:
Cubs open 3 games at Oracle Park tonight — Giants (28-41), 9:15 PM CT.

Javier Assad starts Game 1. Cubs sit at 35-34, hunting a wild card spot. SF has been one of MLB's worst teams all season.

This stretch of the schedule is an opportunity.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Game Recap — Cubs 9, Rockies 3 — Suzuki Grand Slam
stories.angle: Seiya Suzuki grand slam in the 4th (10th HR, 3rd career slam), Bregman 2-run HR, Cabrera wins 4th game. Cubs snapped 3-game skid with 9 runs — most since May 27.

x_posts.label: Post 2A
x_posts.text:
Cubs 9, Rockies 3. Seiya Suzuki's grand slam in the 4th snapped a 3-game losing streak and started a 9-run barrage.

Alex Bregman added a 2-run HR. Cabrera picked up his 4th win.

Offense woke up — 9 runs, most since May 27. Cubs move to 35-34.

#Cubs #FlyTheW #GoCubs
x_posts.tweet_type: Morning game recap (time-sensitive, required Tier 1 slot)

stories.title: Ben Brown — 1.74 ERA, Saturday's Anchor
stories.angle: Brown takes the mound Saturday with 1.74 ERA, 0.88 WHIP, 58 K, 0 HRs allowed as a starter. He IS the Cubs' ace right now with the rotation in shambles.

x_posts.label: Post 3A
x_posts.text:
Ben Brown takes the mound Saturday at Oracle Park — 1.74 ERA, 0.88 WHIP, 58 strikeouts this season.

He's been the most reliable arm on this staff all year. 0 HRs allowed as a starter in 2026.

With the rotation in shambles, Brown IS the Cubs' ace right now.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Rotation Crisis + August 3 Trade Deadline
stories.angle: Horton (TJS), Steele (UCL), Taillon (hamstring, through All-Star break), Boyd (shoulder) — 4 projected starters unavailable. August 3 is 52 days away. Detmers, Ryan, Alcantara linked.

x_posts.label: Post 4A
x_posts.text:
Horton: Tommy John. Steele: still waiting. Taillon: out through the All-Star break. Boyd: shoulder soreness, not ready.

4 starters unavailable. August 3 is 52 days away.

Detmers, Ryan, Alcantara — the Cubs NEED to make a move.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Wild Card Reality — 35-34 With Brewers at 41-23
stories.angle: Cubs 35-34, 1 game over .500. Brewers running away at 41-23. Division out of reach. Wild card is the real race. This Giants road trip is where they make their case.

x_posts.label: Post 5A
x_posts.text:
Cubs are 35-34 and 1 game over .500, with the Brewers running away at 41-23.

Division title is out of reach. Wild card is the real race.

This road trip against a 28-41 Giants squad is where the Cubs make their case.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

stories.title: Iowa Cubs Rolling + Antoine Kelly at Iowa
stories.angle: Iowa beat Louisville 10-2 (June 10). Antoine Kelly (acquired from Dodgers June 6) logging innings at Iowa. System depth is the quiet insurance policy during the big-league rotation crisis.

x_posts.label: Post 6A
x_posts.text:
Iowa Cubs beat Louisville 10-2 on June 10 — the system is rolling while the big league club grinds through rotation injuries.

LHP Antoine Kelly (from LA on June 6) is logging innings at Iowa. The depth isn't glamorous right now, but it's working.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Pre-Game Hype — Giants Series Opener, 9:15 PM CT
stories.angle: Giants hired Tony Vitello with zero pro coaching experience; they're 28-41. Cubs need to prove they can beat bad teams consistently. 3 games this weekend is the test.

x_posts.label: Post 7A
x_posts.text:
The Giants hired Tony Vitello as their first manager with zero pro coaching experience. They're 28-41.

The Cubs need to beat bad teams to stay in the wild card race. 3 games at Oracle Park this weekend is the test.

9:15 PM CT tonight. Game on.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW
